title: anthyllis vulneraria subsp. rubriflora
intro: Anthyllis vulneraria subsp. rubriflora, also known as kidney vetch, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the legume family, Fabaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of kidney vetch include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Kidney vetch is often prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or tincture, and can be consumed as a supplement to support overall health and well-being.
